summary: OAuth CSRF state storage verification complete. All 8 test scenarios passed. The belt-and-braces approach (localStorage + cookie) is working correctly. State is stored in BOTH locations, cookie fallback works when localStorage is wiped (simulating DNS hop), state mismatch is correctly detected, and state is cleared after successful verification.
critical_code_review_comments: oauthState.js correctly implements belt-and-braces storage: saveOAuthState writes to BOTH localStorage AND cookie
readOAuthState correctly falls back to cookie when localStorage is empty (line 39-47)
clearOAuthState clears BOTH localStorage AND cookie (line 50-55)
AuthCallback in App.js correctly verifies state at lines 103-110 and clears it at line 111
Retry button in AuthCallback correctly regenerates state (lines 236-237)
context_for_next_testing_agent: OAuth CSRF state storage fully verified. Cannot test real Google OAuth flow (requires browser consent). All state storage/retrieval/clearing logic working correctly.

test_1_landing_page_loads.description: Landing page loads without JS errors

test_2_google_oauth_url_construction.description: Sign In button builds correct Google OAuth URL with all required params (client_id, redirect_uri, response_type=code, scope=openid email profile, access_type=online, prompt=select_account, state)

test_3_state_stored_in_both_locations.description: OAuth state stored in BOTH localStorage AND cookie with SAME value before redirect

test_4_matching_state_passes.description: Callback with matching state does NOT show state mismatch error (error is about invalid code)

test_5_wrong_state_fails.description: Callback with wrong state correctly shows 'Security check failed (state mismatch)' error

test_6_cookie_fallback_works.description: When localStorage is wiped (simulating DNS hop), readOAuthState falls back to cookie and state check passes

test_7_state_cleared_after_check.description: Both localStorage and cookie state cleared after successful state verification

test_8_retry_button_regenerates_state.description: Retry button on error page regenerates new state and redirects to Google

test_9_email_password_regression.description: Email/password login form still functions (shows error for invalid credentials, doesn't crash)

test_10_backend_smoke_invalid_code.description: POST /api/auth/google/callback with invalid code returns 401 JSON error (not 500)

test_11_backend_smoke_missing_params.description: POST /api/auth/google/callback with missing params returns 400 'code and redirect_uri required'

oauth_state_flow_verified.step_2_state_storage: saveOAuthState() writes to localStorage AND cookie
oauth_state_flow_verified.step_4_callback_state_read: readOAuthState() reads from localStorage, falls back to cookie
oauth_state_flow_verified.step_5_state_verification: AuthCallback compares returned state with stored state
oauth_state_flow_verified.step_6_state_cleanup: clearOAuthState() removes from both localStorage and cookie
